free_text: .Measurement of Neutron Capture Cross Section of
Np-237 by linac time-of flight method and with
.Neptunium oxide Np-O2 powder, weight 1.13 gram packed
in aluminium disk container 30 mm diameter, 1.4 mm
thick. Purity of sample is 99.6% by weight. Major
impurities are Ga, K, P, Rb, S about 4 milligram in
- Total error equal to the quadratic sum
- Error due to deviation from 1/v form in
- Max error due to correction for neutron
- Min error due to correction for neutron
directed to 135 degree relative to flight path
A pair of C6D6 liquid scintillators for gamma-
ray measurement, each 11 cm in diameter, 5 cm thick
.Neutron collimation system was composed of lead and
B4-C, Li2-C-O3 and tapered from about 12 cm in
diameter at the entrance of flight tube.
.Linac was operated in two dufferent modes. One - for
the measurements below 10 eV with repetition rate
30 Hz, pulse width 3 microsec, peak electron current
0.4 Amp, electron energy 30 MeV. Another - for measu-
rements above 0.2 eV with repetition rate 100 Hz,
pulse width 33 nanosec, electron peak current 3 A,
.Corrections were made for neutron multiple scattering
and self-absorption in sample with the help of Monte
Carlo calculations employing MCNP code, and for back-
Units changed to barn - after Drs.
directed to 135 degree relative to flight path
Photo-neutrons moderated in a lead cube
gamma-ray measurement, 12.7 mm in diameter, 6.3 cm
.Relative full width of the spectrum is 26.7%
